papers.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
papers.description: Our latest voice model has improved precision and lower latency to make voice interactions more fluid, natural and precise.

papers.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
papers.description: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.

papers.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
papers.description: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.

papers.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
papers.description: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.

papers.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
papers.description: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.

papers.title: Creating with Sora Safely
papers.description: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.

papers.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
papers.description: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools

papers.title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
papers.description: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.

papers.title: Introducing GPT-5.4 mini and nano
papers.description: GPT-5.4 mini and nano are smaller, faster versions of GPT-5.4 optimized for coding, tool use, multimodal reasoning, and high-volume API and sub-agent workloads.

papers.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
papers.description: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
